vibe: Professional finance dashboard, high-density terminal chic, authoritative and precise.

scales.data_label: text-[10px] sm:text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-semibold text-zinc-400

spacing_and_layout.grid: Control Room (Mode B) - Dense and scanning-optimized.

components.cards: Flat background (bg-zinc-900), subtle border (border-zinc-800), no shadow. Hover: slight border color change (border-zinc-700) and -translate-y-[1px].
components.buttons: Primary: Solid bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white. Secondary: Transparent bg, border border-zinc-700 hover:bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-300.
components.tables: Dense rows, tabular numbers (font-mono). Columns aligned based on data type (numbers right-aligned).
components.badges: Pill-shaped (rounded-full), text-xs font-medium. Bullish (green text/bg), Bearish (red text/bg), Neutral (zinc text/bg).
components.inputs: bg-zinc-950, border-zinc-800, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-600. text-white placeholder:text-zinc-500.
components.chatbot: Integrated side panel or distinct column (Control Room vibe). Use glassmorphism only if floating: bg-zinc-950/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-l border-zinc-800.
components.charts: Recharts. Grid lines should be very faint (stroke='#27272a'). Tooltips must match dark theme with border.

images.description: Abstract dark neon lines for login page or landing hero
Dark stock market chart screenshot for placeholder
Apple logo placeholder for company details

icons.usage: Minimalist, stroke-width 1.5, size 16px to 20px for UI elements. Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) if building dense data tables requiring highly legible miniature icons.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements, forms, links, buttons, and key informational values MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., 'submit-trade-btn', 'stock-price-value').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure pure white text on deep background passes APCA. Use explicitly colored text for hover states (e.g., hover:text-white).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT use generic grays; stick to the Zinc scale as defined (Zinc 950 for background, Zinc 900 for cards, Zinc 800 for borders).
Use Shadcn UI extensively for complex dashboard elements (Tables, Tabs, Cards, Badges, Input). Remove box-shadows from standard Shadcn cards to maintain the flat 'Terminal' look.
For financial data, numbers MUST use 'JetBrains Mono' font or another monospaced font so decimals and digits align properly across rows.
Implement Recharts for financial visualization. Ensure chart lines and area gradients use the exact market colors (bullish/bearish) or brand blue for neutral data.
The AI chatbot interface should feel integrated into the terminal environment. Make it a dedicated sticky side-panel, avoiding bouncy/playful floating bubbles.
Remember to include data-testid on every single interactive component and critical data node for automated testing.
Apply `font-mono` explicitly to price tags, ticker symbols, and volume metrics.
Import Google fonts: Chivo (headings), IBM Plex Sans (body), and JetBrains Mono (data).
